item.title: Kasule Owen
item.description: Kasule Owen (born 3 March 1989 in Kampala) is a Ugandan soccer player, who last played as a midfielder for Uganda super league club Kyetume FC

item.title: João Gonçalves (footballer, born 2000)
item.description: João Pedro Oliveira Gonçalves (born 5 November 2000) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper.

item.title: Nélia Dias
item.description: Nélia Susana Dias is a Portuguese anthropologist, academic, and researcher in cultural heritage, history of anthropology, and museology. She is an Associate Professor at the Department of Anthropology at the University Institute of Lisbon (ISCTI).

item.title: Variations in Blue
item.description: Variations in Blue is an album by saxophonist Bill Barron which was recorded in 1983 and first released on the Muse label.[1][2][3]

item.title: 1915–16 Belfast Charity Cup
item.description: The 1915–16 Belfast Charity Cup was the 33rd edition of the Belfast Charity Cup, a cup competition in Irish football.[1]
